'''âz-w-v''' ('''kazawav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cocksuck|cocksuck]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cocksuck|cocksuck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-w-v
|-
! Lemma
| kazawav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizawav|thizawav]] || [[word:jizawav|jizawav]] || [[word:shizawav|shizawav]] || [[word:kizawav|kizawav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzawav|thuthuzawav]] || [[word:jujuzawav|jujuzawav]] || [[word:shushuzawav|shushuzawav]] || [[word:kukuzawav|kukuzawav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzawav|thuzawav]] || [[word:juzawav|juzawav]] || [[word:shuzawav|shuzawav]] || [[word:kuzawav|kuzawav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzawav|thuzawav]] || [[word:juzawav|juzawav]] || [[word:shuzawav|shuzawav]] || [[word:kuzawav|kuzawav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezawav|thezawav]] || [[word:jezawav|jezawav]] || [[word:shezawav|shezawav]] || [[word:kezawav|kezawav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozawav|thothozawav]] || [[word:jojozawav|jojozawav]] || [[word:shoshozawav|shoshozawav]] || [[word:kokozawav|kokozawav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozawav|thozawav]] || [[word:jozawav|jozawav]] || [[word:shozawav|shozawav]] || [[word:kozawav|kozawav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozawav|thozawav]] || [[word:jozawav|jozawav]] || [[word:shozawav|shozawav]] || [[word:kozawav|kozawav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzawav|thĂŠzawav]] || [[word:jĂŠzawav|jĂŠzawav]] || [[word:shĂŠzawav|shĂŠzawav]] || [[word:kĂŠzawav|kĂŠzawav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazawav|thathazawav]] || [[word:jajazawav|jajazawav]] || [[word:shashazawav|shashazawav]] || [[word:kakazawav|kakazawav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazawav|thazawav]] || [[word:jazawav|jazawav]] || [[word:shazawav|shazawav]] || [[word:kazawav|kazawav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazawav|thazawav]] || [[word:jazawav|jazawav]] || [[word:shazawav|shazawav]] || [[word:kazawav|kazawav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazawav|shazawav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazawav|goshazawav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazawav|gokishazawav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazawavnĂŒ|shazawavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazawavnknĂŒ|goshazawavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazawavnĂŒ|gokishazawavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazawavshĂ«|shazawavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazawavnkshĂ«|goshazawavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazawavshĂ«|gokishazawavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazawavro|shazawavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazawavnkro|goshazawavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazawavro|gokishazawavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazawavmu|shazawavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazawavnkmu|goshazawavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazawavmu|gokishazawavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazawavsher|shazawavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazawavnksher|goshazawavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazawavsher|gokishazawavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazawavng|shazawavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazawavnkng|goshazawavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazawavng|gokishazawavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazawavya|shazawavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazawavnkya|goshazawavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazawavya|gokishazawavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazawavyam|shazawavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazawavnkyam|goshazawavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazawavyam|gokishazawavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazawavnĂŒshĂ«|shazawavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazawavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazawavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazawavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazawavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazawavnĂŒro|shazawavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazawavnknĂŒro|goshazawavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazawavnĂŒro|gokishazawavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazawavnĂŒmu|shazawavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazawavnknĂŒmu|goshazawavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazawavnĂŒmu|gokishazawavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazawavshĂ«nĂŒ|shazawavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazawavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazawavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazawavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazawavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazawavshĂ«ro|shazawavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazawavnkshĂ«ro|goshazawavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazawavshĂ«ro|gokishazawavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazawavshĂ«mu|shazawavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazawavnkshĂ«mu|goshazawavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazawavshĂ«mu|gokishazawavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazawavronĂŒ|shazawavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazawavnkronĂŒ|goshazawavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazawavronĂŒ|gokishazawavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazawavroshĂ«|shazawavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazawavnkroshĂ«|goshazawavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazawavroshĂ«|gokishazawavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazawavromu|shazawavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazawavnkromu|goshazawavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazawavromu|gokishazawavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazawavmunĂŒ|shazawavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazawavnkmunĂŒ|goshazawavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazawavmunĂŒ|gokishazawavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazawavmushĂ«|shazawavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazawavnkmushĂ«|goshazawavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazawavmushĂ«|gokishazawavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazawavmuro|shazawavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazawavnkmuro|goshazawavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazawavmuro|gokishazawavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
